samples.gvd:
module pe(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [31:0] a,
    input [31:0] b,
    output reg [31:0] c
);
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
      c <= 0;
    end else begin
      c <= c + a * b;
    end
  end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pe">
    <description>Implement a Multiplying Accumulator for 32bit integer.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal. Defined as 1 for reset and 0 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="c" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the accumulated result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="MAC_PE">This is a multiplier-accumulator (MAC) unit that performs partial accumulation.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>Implement a multiplier-accumulator (MAC) unit that performs partial accumulation.</implementation>
</module>
